creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Can you have a look if we can change archive name to something more intuitive/sensible?

I did a quick test and this seems to be working as MASTER_SITES https://codeberg.org/dnkl/tllist/archive/984042b17bee67531e978bfc9ca76c4bc4533ed2.tar.gz?/ where 98xxx is the release hash/commit and drop DISTNAME.

Best regards,
Daniel
